title: Furrest Modpack
description: A pack that's meant to enhance the Minecraft visuals, sounds & client-side features by adding simple mods and not overdoing it.
body:
![tmp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff1573ed6bf63839e3b5ac61350af2f5e91b116a_0.webp)
A pack that's meant to enhance the Minecraft visuals, sounds & client-side features!
## Features:
- Dynamic Lights
- Simple Voicechat
- Enhanced Menus
- Sound Additions
- Player Animations
- Shaderpack Support
- Schematic Viewer
- Light Level Visualizer
